entry.title: Re: Key Tables
entry.content: Thank yo so much

entry.title: Purchase document is allocated to asset
entry.content:
Whenever I am trying to make an advance payment into ''Public Cloub'' against asset purchase order with special gl indicator A, system is not allowing to do so giving the below mentioned error. Please solve this issue

Purchase document is allocated to asset

Diagnosis

The asset number   assigned in the purchase document


o is different from the asset number entered manually

o cannot be transferred, because the 'Asset number' field was hidden
for the account in question

System Response

In the first instance a warning appears, drawing your attention to the
different account assignments. In the second instance an error message
appears, because the asset number must be transferred from the purchase
order but the necessary field is hidden.

Procedure

If you receive the warning, check which asset number is the correct
number for this down payment.

If you receive an error message, you must either choose another special
G/L indicator for down payments so that it is possible to assign an
asset number to the relevant general ledger account, or you must change.

entry.title: Re: Getting error in Eclipse ADT "Business Catalog is not...
entry.content: Thank you Sandra for your reply. I got your point, but just wanted to let you know that I created Application Job catalogs and Job templates from Eclipse. I can see them in the Fiori tile - Maintain Application Job template but not able to see them in Application Jobs screen. Checked the new authorizations from the above Note, they are already assigned to my user id. One more thing, from Fiori tile - Maintain Application Job template, I copied standard template and maintained my custom template as step2 along with the standard template as step1. I am trying to hide step1 while creating Application jobs from Fiori tile, I am still getting step1 selection screen even when I hide it. Any suggestion on this to hide standard template as we cannot delete it?

entry.title: Business partner in Human resources, field override
entry.content:
Hi all,

We are synching our employees into business partners now in an S4 Hana on prem.

I have noticed that the user department in SU01 is synched from the long text of the org. unit, and we would like change it for the SHORT text of the org unit.

I have been checking enhancement spot /SHCM/B_EE_BP_SYNC, and I can see a lot fields in there, but I can't find the department.

When the user is synched, I can see the department is taken from field WORKPLACE from ADDRESS_DATA_CORE, but I cannot find it in the Badi/Spot.

Any guiding light to check if this can be done wihout an implicit enhancement?

Thanks,

Pablo.

entry.title: Re: How can I add a new SAP Managed Tag for blog posts and edit existing tags?
entry.content: @papri_rudra29 You can find the list of all SAP Managed tags here: https://community.sap.com/t5/all-sap-managed-tags/ct-p/managed-tags

entry.title: Re: How to get notified by email when Application Autosca...
entry.content:
Hi, Thanks a lot for the helpful suggestion! Following your guidance, I was able to successfully receive notifications when my app scaled down. Here's what I did step by step:
1) I updated the Alert Notification service instance using: cf update-service SERVICE_NAME -c "{\"enableCloudControllerAuditEvents\": true}"
2) In the Alert Notification cockpit, I created a subscription with the following conditions: eventType is equal to audit.app.process.scale resource.resourceName is equal to APP_NAME
3) I then triggered the event manually using: cf scale APP_NAME -i 1
After this setup, I was able to receive the email notification successfully. Thanks again for pointing me in the right direction.

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP Trial Account Creation and Enabling Integration Suite service(SAP CPI)
entry.content: Way too small screenshots. Nice tutorial tho

entry.title: Re: Integrate SAP CRM WEB UI in BTP Build Work Zone

There is no error in the network tab, error is coming in the Console.

However we have not done any configuration related to clickjacking in the CRM System.

Please let me if there is any help document explaining this configuration for the manual integration of app.

 

Regards,

Rohit Gera

entry.title: Re: Selective Data Transfer to SAP Cloud ALM: Why It Matters and How to Approach It

Interesting and Informative blog.

Sathish

entry.title: Implementação da NT 2024.003
entry.content:
Olá, pessoal!

Estou utilizando o SAP S/4HANA 2022 e apliquei a nota técnica 3527792_E_20250516 com sucesso. Também realizei todas as parametrizações manuais indicadas na documentação da nota.

Porém, ao acessar a transação J1B2N, os novos campos que deveriam ser disponibilizados conforme a nota não estão sendo exibidos.

Já validei:

  • A aplicação da nota no sistema via SNOTE;

  • As configurações manuais (views e SPRO);

  • Permissões de usuário;

  • E cache da transação.

Gostaria de saber:

  1. Existe alguma BAdI (por exemplo, J_1BNF_ADD_DATA) que precise ser implementada ou ajustada para que os campos apareçam?

  2. Alguém enfrentou o mesmo problema após aplicar essa nota?

  3. Existe alguma outra nota SAP complementar que deva ser aplicada?

Agradeço desde já qualquer orientação!

entry.title: sap s4hana cloud - creating journal entry with Business Partner or G/L Account.
entry.content: Need help. It seems that my sap s4/hana cloud does not permits me to create journal entry manually with a business partner. is that true for your software?

entry.title: Re: Consolidation Monitor (new) is not visible after upgr...
entry.content:
Hi All, This was resolved as the fiori app was deactivated in business roles for this app. Once this was activated the app was visible.

Thanks and Regards,

Vijay

entry.title: SAP AI Launchpad Generic Secret Creation
entry.content:
Hi, 

I'm exploring SAP AI Launchpad Standard and I have issue while creating Generic Secret.

I'm using SAP BTP Object Store to store my data. During creation of Generic Secret I've received following error: 

{
    "error": {
        "code": "400",
        "message": "'authentication' is missing in data."
    }
}
I added two labels: 
document-grounding : true
documentRepositoryType : S3

With those labels (document-grounding to be specific) i got an error 

, my secret structure looks as follows: 

{"access_key_id": "base64encoded",
"bucket": "base64encoded",
"host": "base64encoded", 
"region": "base64encoded", 
"secret_access_key": "base64encoded", 
"uri":"base64encoded",
"username":"base64encoded"}

so indeed there is no authentication field but what should passed there in S3 scenario?
Additionaly, if I try to create generic secret without label document-grounding:true it is possible but if I then go to Grounding Management and try to create Data Repository following error appears

Error Code: 404
Message: Received not found from document grounding api = {'requestId': '1394b8d8-88a1-46ee-b840-3b6408aef4dd', 'code': 404, 'message': 'Destination in Configuration not found'}

BTW. I did try to create Generic Secret via Postman as well and the same error appears.
Any ideas? 
Kind regards

entry.title: Re: Payload Examples for API Journal Entry – Post
entry.content:
Hi  @Wesley, thanks for these great examples and we are now able to post into our S/4 HANA 2023 FPS03 system via API Management. But we do have one business need. We need to have external number ranges, as the master system is an external system and we like to have same document number in S/4 and other system. Is ther any chance to use external number ranges with this SAOP Webservice?

Regards Tobias

entry.title: Can SAP BTP Alert Notification Service send SMS directly?
entry.content: I’m using SAP BTP Alert Notification Service for monitoring and alerting. I want to send SMS messages directly (without external API providers or hardware). Does SAP Alert Notification support SMS as a native channel? If not, what are the best practices to send SMS via webhook integration?SAP Alert Notification service for SAP BTP

entry.title: Re: SAP PaPM Cloud Standard Model: Modeling Update (Join)
entry.content:
Hello @Paulo_Moncada,
Thanks for the information about the changes. But IMO, this philosophy of creating a "worldwide beta-testing" is at minimum worrying. It is already bad enough when we have unannounced updates, even if they are for quality-of-life changes. But this update makes no sense. We are forced to work differently only for the join function, while model joins, views, etc have the prior behavior. Worse than that, the change was pushed without a way to simply continue to operate on the prior behavior in case of:
1- difficulties of adaptation midweek - impacting project development
2- issues with the rollout, like the missing field auto completion.

entry.title: Successfactors LMS : Overdue learning notification
entry.content: A user, has been receiving email notifications from the LMS that state he needs to complete a course. However, he has already completed the course, as is reflected in users learning history. User no longer has the course in  assignments, so I’m not sure what would cause to be picked up in the notification email.

entry.title: Re: Learn BTP, Joule, and AI – as SAP Business Analyst or...
entry.content:
Hi @KavneetKaur 
Please access our Artificial Intelligence learn by product site where you can unlock the power of AI to streamline operations, boost productivity, and drive smarter, data-informed decisions—faster than ever.
Please explore our search function to find the learning that suits your inquiry, access the search results  for SAP Joule and SAP AI Core here 
Browse our Data and Analytics site and learn how to get the most value from data with tools that help you deliver insights and transform data planning and analysis.
Explore our SAP Build Process Automation site and learn how to build and automate workflows with bots and AI using SAP Build Process Automation. 
Access our SAP Integration Suite site and learn how to connect systems, automate business processes, and harmonize experiences across the extended enterprise.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Performance Management Story Report
entry.content:
Hi,

I have created the  story report and it is working fine for me even if I am proxying anyone else, but if the same report is run by other users Performance Rating appears in decimal and column names also appearing differently in some cases.

And in few cases output is blank but once I proxied, I got the output.

Kindly suggest.

Regards,
P

entry.title: AI Launchpad, Generic Secret Creation Error, Creation of Data Repository for Grounding not possible
entry.content:
Hi, 

I'm exploring SAP AI Launchpad Standard and I have issue while creating Generic Secret.

I'm using SAP BTP Object Store to store my data. During creation of Generic Secret I've received following error: 

{
    "error": {
        "code": "400",
        "message": "'authentication' is missing in data."
    }
}
I added two labels: 
document-grounding : true
documentRepositoryType : S3

With those labels (document-grounding to be specific) i got an error 

, my secret structure looks as follows: 

 

{"access_key_id": "base64encoded",
"bucket": "base64encoded",
"host": "base64encoded", 
"region": "base64encoded", 
"secret_access_key": "base64encoded", 
"uri":"base64encoded",
"username":"base64encoded"}

 

so indeed there is no authentication field but what should passed there in S3 scenario?
Additionaly, if I try to create generic secret without label document-grounding:true it is possible but if I then go to Grounding Management and try to create Data Repository following error appears

Error Code: 404
Message: Received not found from document grounding api = {'requestId': '1394b8d8-88a1-46ee-b840-3b6408aef4dd', 'code': 404, 'message': 'Destination in Configuration not found'}

BTW. I did try to create Generic Secret via Postman as well and the same error appears.
Any ideas? 
Kind regards

entry.title: Re: Certificate C_S4CPB_2502
entry.content:
Hi @Fabr 

If you run into issue during enrollment or practice in the learning system please create a case
Please make sure to select "Practice Systems" as the “Service Category” and kindly fill out the appropriate form. When raising an inquiry, include detailed information in the description to help our team assist you better.
Please also check our Practice systems support site where you find a list of general questions and answers on practice systems, all designed to help you to resolve issues may encounter on SAP Learning.
Kind regards
Margit

 

Kind regards

Margit

entry.title: Re: Can SAP BTP Alert Notification Service send SMS direc...
entry.content:
The current actions available are -

  1. Email
  2. Email with custom SMTP server
  3. Microsoft Teams
  4. PagerDuty (maybe the closest in form of an API)
  5. SAP Automation Pilot
  6. SAP Workflow service
  7. ServiceNow Case
  8. ServiceNow Incident
  9. Slack
  10. Slack threaded
  11. Store
  12. VictorOps
  13. Webhook
  14. Webhook with Authorizatoin Token
  15. Webhook with Basic Authentication
  16. Webhook with OAuth 2.0 Authentication

 

Regards,

Ryan Crosby

2) what is the workaround for Virtual Desktops? I am waiting for customer support to install also service state to Desktop agent, so hope that will fix the issue and scenario will unlock windows session, am I right?

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: How to use SAP CPQ Script Plugin - Step by Step Instructions

This one is really a huge benefit compared to the online editor i was using last weeks!

While linking seemed easy and straight forward somehow pushing changed files seems not to have any effect. No errors, no effect for me.

entry.title: Re: Help – Why don't I get a situation notification?
entry.content:
Hi Sara,
I recommend to start by analyzing the log messages of the situation handling framework as described by Axel here:
Log Analysis for the Standard Framework of Situati... - SAP Community
Do you receive events, are situation instances created, are recipients detected, is you user contained in the recipients' list and is monitoring situations enabled?
Best,
Joerg

entry.title: Re: Getting Assertion failed error in RCM email template...
entry.content: FYI, this issue has occurred again after the 1H 2025 release; as of at least 23-May-2025, per KBA https://me.sap.com/notes/3610978

SAP S/4HANA Cloud – Output Management - Barcodes and QR Codes on forms

entry.title: Re: 供應商發票可否跨公司不同公司幣建立
entry.content:
Machine translation:

Can Supplier Invoice Be Created Across Company Currencies

Hi Expert,
The business context is
The customer creates a header with USD in the parent company currency and as item1 it is the subsidiary company currency JPY,item2 is the subsidiary company currency USD.
Currently, the limit by standard processes can only be created in which case the header is the parent company currency of USD, in case item1 is the subsidiary USD company currency (with Scopeitem 1GP).

Ask how you want to generate a supplier invoice in JPY currency for the header parent company USD as the subsidiary company currency.

entry.title: Upload Bank statement CAMT053 not successful!
entry.content:
Hello,

I want to upload a bank statement in the app: manage bank statements. I use the format: 

camt.053.001.02. The format of the bank statement is:

xmlns="urn:iso:std:iso:20022:tech:xsd:camt.053.001.02">

In the protocol I got the information:

External + transaction code is not specified for transaction type CAMT053.

And the error: Bank statement file was not updated.

I attached the xml.

I am anonymized the following lines

IBAN

USTRD

Thank you! 🙂

 

Update: I checked the relevant KBA FTE_FIEB012

It says that the sub node BkTxCd is positioned the under node Ntry. But in the file is no sub node BkTxCd. The bank doesnt give me another bank statement.

entry.title: Not able to complete Subsequent implementation of a further accounting principle steps.
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Currently we are working on Brownfield implementation where we are in preparation for migration phase on asset accounting.

We have to achieve the same configuration of depreciation area which is present in production system were depreciation area 01 and 30 both are posting APC values where 01 is posting in realtime and 30 Posting APC values immediately and depreciation periodically.

In S/4 HANA as we have to assign ledgers to depreciation area so it is not possible to keep 2 depreciation areas to post APC Values and depreciation. As for our client 01 Depreciation area used in reporting as per IFRS reporting standard and 30 for Local Balance sheet so it is mandatory for them to post APC and Depreciation value on 30 as well.

To achieve this we created a new non leading ledger along with new accounting principle. As the company code is productive, we have to complete subsequent implementation of further accounting principal step.

There we have to assign a Source depreciation area to target depreciation area and the pre-requisite is to create a depreciation area first.

The issue is when we are creating the new depreciation area system is asking to assign new ledger and when we assign the ledger system is throwing error that company code is not assigned to ledger.

When we try to assign the ledger to company code their system provides an consistency check that recommends if company code is already in use in production then complete Subsequent implementation of a further accounting principle .

So if I summarize it:-

  1. If we create Depreciation area there we have to assign New Ledger L2.
  2. To save the configuration we have to assign Ledger L2 to Company code 3126
  3. When we are trying to assign it to company code we are getting consistency check where it recommended to complete Subsequent implementation of further accounting principle as highlighted in above screenshot.
  4. Without new depreciation area we cannot go ahead to complete other steps as we will not be able to transfer the asset values if we do not complete step- Assign Target Depreciation Areas to Source Depreciation Areas.

Shall we ignore Consistency check and go ahead with assignment of company code? If yes will it impact the historical data transfer.

Also the 2nd Requirement is how client will be able to create a balance sheet integrating both of the ledger postings.

Please if someone has any document please help to provide or any insights will be highly appreciated to overcome the issue.

SAP S/4HANA Finance  FIN Asset Accounting SAP General Ledger Migration SAP Help Portal SAP S/4HANA migration cockpit SAP Community 

Thanks,

Yash

entry.title: Re: Introducing the New PaPM Step in Multi Actions in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Everyone, 

Is this PAPM Integration step also application to PAPM on premise?

entry.title: Re: Integrate SAP CRM WEB UI in BTP Build Work Zone
entry.content:
This link is for S4HANA. https://help.sap.com/docs/CIAS%20FES%202020/ecb81b5bfce440ca8e7e7c9ad58fcf3a/981311d8f8b34c00b28c0670a4194de3.html

We'll need to see if there is something similar for SAP CRM. 

Meanwhile, can you also do an expert chat with SAP for guidance. I think its worth a shot.

entry.title: Re: Remove Material Type ERSA in Unplanned Maintenance Co...
entry.content:
Hi Mona, I hope you are using public cloud. Currently the only option is to remove it from filters which will enable you to select other material type or see all types of materials. There is no option for defaulting other material type as of now but we are exploring the option to enable this in future.

Best regards,

Vikas

entry.title: Re: Introducing the New PaPM Step in Multi Actions in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hi @nayanvaria ,

I think that works only on the PaPM cloud version.

Kind regards,

Tarkan

entry.title: Re: 通过项目管理在建工程，就是创建了投资项目后，并且勾选了向下结构传递，一个项目也创建了不同阶段的wbs要素分解，帮助文档中说明，向下机构传递勾选后，其余运行会采用主项目结算规则，然后运行期末结算
entry.content:
Machine translation:

Once the investment project has been created through project management, and the down structure is passed on, a project also creates the breakdown of wbs elements in different phases. Help document indicates that when the check is passed on to the down-office, the rest of the run will take the main project settlement rule and then run period-end closing

#S4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance, project management for assets under construction, after the investment project has been created, and the down structure is passed on, a project also creates different phases of wbs breakdown, help document, and the downwards pass on the check, the rest of the run will use the main project settlement rule, and then run period-end closing why if this wbs were transferred to different AuC separately, did not test before, what I want to do is, all the broken down

[Screenshots]

The subelements are carried forward to an AuC and how they should be handled, as shown in the following figure:

entry.title: Re: Integrate SAP CRM WEB UI in BTP Build Work Zone

entry.title: Re: Fusion Forward: Unlocking Innovation with SAP Build – Series 1: What is Fusion Development?
entry.content:
When you generate your LLM Post here at least check for errors.

There is no feature to follow your profile and receive updates.

Also, this could have been a post by SAP reading from a press release. At least add your thoughts somewhere or some negatives.

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP Destination to s4 Public Cloud Gives error wh...
entry.content:
Hello @suneelrelish 

Can you also add the following parameters/properties in the destination pointing to S4 BP API? 

  • sap.processautomation.enabled = "true"
  • sap.applicationdevelopment.actions.enabled = "true"

I believe with these properties the connection should be successful. 

Please try and let me know. 

Thank you

Tiago Ribeiro

entry.title: Re: SAP -Generative AI
entry.content: When you copy paste from your favourite LLM, you need to check if the images and formatting are transferred as well.

entry.title: Re: Boosting ABAP Development in Eclipse with Vrapper
entry.content:
I see, you want to use Vim everywhere 😄

Never found the love for Vim, but apparently lot of people use it. Good to know what is possible with Vim.

entry.title: Re: A ranges utility
entry.content:
That's a great tool.

(Un) Fortunately I never needed to use ranges for a while. But with a simple class I don't even need abapgit to import it.

Thanks!

P.S.: I wanted suggest to add it to dotabap.org but it's already added 🙂

entry.title: Re: SAP Table for Budget Report
entry.content: Hi Mohammed. Do you need to extract only the budget, or the actuals as well? This report, besides the budget, also includes actuals and commitments, so it will indeed be very heavy. Try extracting from the budget report only.

entry.title: Re: How to use SAP Signavio to improve AI usage?
entry.content:
Hey Rogerio, we have a lot in common in terms of our experience with SAP and process intelligence (aka process mining).   

First of all, you have to be ok with the fact that there is no way you are covering all possibilities to identify or discover all the possibilities you can find for your client for AI and automation...  I take the approach of starting with lower hanging fruit and finding quick wins.   

One way you can do that is look for task that have automation already.  Look at items that have 20-80% automation rate.  Why should you look at these?   These are usually ripe for additional adoption which are  quick wins with smaller investments and clients love this.  If the business has tasks or processes that are in this range it usually indicates that they likely have an automation and are not fully adopting it, the closer to 20% means that  training and awareness may get them higher utilization, the closer to 80% means that maybe they have adopted the automation but still have variants that the automation can not handle and you can look for simple AI solutions to help them achieve higher utilization.   For example, if client already has 60% automation at Sales Order creation you should look at the most common variants of the remaining 40% and understand what is the most common reason they are not using the automation.  Once you find commonality (beyond simple adoption) like CSRs have to look up pricing, you can look at developing an simple AI co-pilot to speed up their searching for pricing using natural language based on the clients rules.   Remember the best AI in business is boring. 

In terms of analyzing business processes to identify bottlenecks, you need to look at E2E scenarios and identify the task(s) that take the longest or have the most rework.  These are your bottlenecks in the process and are root causes of the symptoms your clients are talking about (i.e. my P2P process takes too long or I cannot process PO's timely etc...).  Once you have identified the specific tasks that are disrupting the flow (bottlenecks) in the process, put a tiger team around brainstorming and solutioning for that specific task which could be AI or an Automation or both. 

Regards,

Bryan

entry.title: Goods receipt not possible for delivery 80000391: error code 4Message no. M7865
entry.content:
getting this error for doing GR of outbound delivery of an inter company purchase

1.PGI is already done 

2.While doing migo getting this error

Goods receipt not possible for delivery 80000391: error code 4

entry.title: Retention Amount in Sales Order Showing with VAT in Manage Customer Line item– Require Exclusion VAT
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support,

We are using Payment Terms as a workaround to manage Retention Amounts in Sales Orders within SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud. However, we have observed a discrepancy in how the retention is displayed in the Manage Customer Line-Item app.

In the Manage Customer Line-Item app

  • The retention amount appears in a separate line, which is expected.

  • However, both the main amount and the retention amount include VAT, which results in a total VAT value that is not aligned with our requirement.

Business Requirement:

  • Retention amount should be displayed without VAT.
  • VAT should only be applied to the net payable amount, excluding the retention until it's due.

Request:

 

We would like to know:

  1. Is there a standard configuration or best practice in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud to exclude VAT from the retention line?
  2. Can retention amount be excluded from VAT calculation or shown separately in reporting?

 

Regards,

Vishal

entry.title: Re: AI Launchpad: Grounding is not enabled
entry.content: Hi, did you manage to Create Data Repository within Grounding Management? I tried to do this with S3 document store type but with no success so far.

entry.title: Compatible Windows O/S for SAP Power Designer
entry.content:
Hello,

Currently we installed SAP PowerDesigner v16.7.0.0 on Windows Server 2016. We are planning to upgrade Windows Operating system 2019 or 2022. Let us know this upgrade will support the SAP Power Designer v16.7.0.0.

Also, we have plans to upgrade the SAP Power Designer to v16.7.8.3. Let us know the compatibility of Windows O/S (2019 / 2022) for both the versions of SAP PD.

Regards


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Compatible Windows O/S for SAP Power Designer
entry.content:
Hello,

Yes, PD 16.7 and 16.7.8.3 support Microsoft Windows Server 2019 and Windows Server 2022.
You can find this information in KBA 2347515 - What is the list of supported Windows operating systems?
and in the installation guide.

Note that the PAM does not mention Windows 2022 yet but will be updated soon to explicitly indicate that Windows 2022 is supported.

Kind regards

entry.title: Re: Changing custom table delivery class from A to C
entry.content: thank you!

entry.title: Re: Getting error in Eclipse ADT "Business Catalog is not...
entry.content: @AkbarHussain Sorry I had no issue seeing my templates when creating a job via F1240 Application Jobs. Better contact the SAP Support.

entry.title: Re: Onboarding/Offboarding Tasks Assigned to all users in...
entry.content: During the check using the Check Tool, we identified that incorrect dynamic groups were being automatically assigned to the onboarding responsible groups. We resolved this issue by using the Quick Fix feature in the Check Tool to remove all incorrectly assigned dynamic groups. As a result, the onboarding and offboarding tasks are now correctly triggered for the appropriate ONB/OFB responsible groups.

entry.title: How to calculate tax for delivery cost condition type in PO
entry.content:
Hi,

     We have scenario like In PO material cost is 120, then Packing cost is 20 and Tax is 18%. In PO Tax is only calculating on Material cost 120 = 21.6 its not calculating for Packing Cost 20. So total amount of Po is 161.6 but it should be 165.2. Kindly provide a solution. I have attached the Pricing procedure.

entry.title: Re: Group account number mandatory in FSP0.
entry.content:
I ran into the same issue and found out something useful. If your chart of accounts has a group chart of accounts assigned to it, then the system will require you to enter a “Group Account Number” when you’re creating a G/L account using FS00 or FSP0. That’s why you're getting the FH740 error.

It’s not really about field status settings—it’s just how SAP works when group charts are involved. This setup helps with consolidation across company codes by grouping similar G/L accounts under a common group account number.

But if your chart of accounts doesn’t have a group chart assigned, then this field won’t even show up, and the system won’t ask for it.

Hope this clears things up!

entry.title: Re: How to map SAP ERP fields to SAP BW/4HANA InfoObjects?
entry.content:
Hi @hadi_jafari 

Thank you for your work. Can you send me this excel file to my e-mail address? I really need it.

sameteskibag.se@gmail.com


Regards

entry.title: SAP S4 : customer master main address in Japanese or Chinese / Compare to English
entry.content:
Hi , We have Sales Org's all over the world , and operate in one instance of SAP . In SAP S/4 , should the customer master main address be in Japanese or Chinese / Compare to Latin characters set ?  Or the other way around ?

Example : Sales Org's JP01 - Japan and CN01 - China , interact with the local customers and vendor in the local language .

The main usage of Latin characters to be set for all customer is to perform a SAP GTS check and some corporate reporting so we understand the customer / vendor  name .

Any OSS note or guidance will be welcome as we want to leverage SAP S4 . Thank you

Bramhani G

entry.title: 2505 / 2504 Release Highlights of SAP Signavio Process Insights
entry.content:
SAP Signavio Process Insights May and April releases 2505/2504
brought again a couple of great enhancements and new out-of-the-box process analysis content. 

My personal highlights are the "Improvement Opportunity Dashboards" and the "Value Cases in Value Analysis". Here you see all details of our enhancements.


"Improvement Opportunity Dashboards" provides you with dashboards for analyzing typical issues that your organization can focus like closing books in financials, user compliance, days in inventory, days payable or days sales outstanding. Here are three videos:

  1. Closing books in financials

  2. Days payable outstanding / working capital

  3. Days in inventory / working capital

  4. Maverick spend improvement opportunities

  5. Days sales outstanding / late customer payment / working capital

"Value Cases in Value Analysis" help to identify and realize the value potential of process improvements. Each value case belongs to a specific value driver and is based on a single performance indicator and its value calculation.

 

 

Here you can learn more about Process Analysis and Mining:

  1. See SAP Signavio Process Insights, Process Intelligence and Plug & Gain in action
  2. Your first steps to get started with SAP Signavio Process Insights
  3. Who do I need to involve and which challenges do I want to solve?
  4. How to start your analysis?
  5. “Cash is King” - but how to become royal? - SAP Community
  6. Why are there two business process analysis soluti... - SAP Community
  7. Plug & Gain:

Plug & Gain Video Series and Plug & Gain OpenSAP
How to use the Plug & Gain Connector
Optimize financial closing process with Plug & Gain

  1. SAP Analytics Cloud Content for Process Insights
  2. SAP Learning:
    SAP Signavio Process Analysis
    SAP Signavio Process Management & Design
    SAP Signavio Solution Configuration
  3. Partner Edge (Login required): Webinar Series for Process Insights
  4. SAP Signavio Process Insights "Whats New?"
  5. SAP Signavio Process Insights Help

entry.title: Re: CREATE button is not appearing after deployed Fiori A...
entry.content: Same issue anyone have a fix? This is for an oData V2 UI.

entry.title: How to customize your SAP LogServ solution in Microsoft Sentinel
entry.content:
Dear community,

Following the product release blog by SAP regarding the integration of SAP LogServ and Microsoft Sentinel, I am going to share some details on customizing the solution to your needs.

The SAP LogServ service in SAP RISE, private cloud edition, gets you access to all the logs produced by the underlying services managed by SAP ECS. Microsoft Sentinel without LogServ is limited to the application layer only. LogServ holds the promise to get a glimpse into the inner workings of RISE to…

  • Satisfy your auditing needs, and
  • Integration with the SIEM solution Microsoft Sentinel.

However, ALL logs are a bit much for many of you and the security value varies a lot. This blog gets you started to make cost conscious decisions while not compromising too much on threat protection insights. The most discussed log in my conversations so far was SAP HANA database.

 

Which logs should I choose?

That needs to be answered based on your needs, what is available, and what you want to achieve. Some just want all logs to store beyond the 365 days covered by LogServ, others only want the HANA DB log, and some want a specific subset across gateways, network, and database. For an up-to-date list always check with SAP.

Here is my opinionated subset that serves as an intro to the topic with no ambition for completeness. Otherwise, this becomes a master thesis kind of thing😉

 

LogServ source

In Scope of your shared responsibility

Threat Protection value

Chattiness

(volume  indication in t-shirt sizes)

Comment

OS (Linux + Windows)

No

Medium

L

Without integration into your EDR less relevant

Database (HANA, ASE, DB2, etc.)

Yes

High

M

Audit relevant

Web Application Firewall

No

Medium

XL

Only http connection info and routing without context

Load Balancer

No

Low

L

Layer 4 /TCP/IP) communication only without context

Network, Flow Logs

No

Medium

XXXL

Useful to trace back lateral movement on a compromise

SAP Cloud Connector

Yes

High

M

Audit log holds all info on connections from SAP BTP

SAP Web Dispatcher

No

Medium

L

Only http connection info and routing with IPs from last hop rather than original client.

ICM

No

Medium

L

Same challenge as with Web Dispatcher.

SAP Gateway (OData)

Yes

Low

M

Mostly exceptions on OData requests. SAP Cloud Connector audit log covers this with higher value.

…

 

 

 

 

 

For the latest list of LogServ source folder names etc. consult with SAP and their documentation.

Be aware, for AS ABAP and AS JAVA security audit log integration you still require the agentless Sentinel Solution for SAP. See the overview diagram in SAP’s blog for more details on the LogServ Addon in combination with the Sentinel for SAP.

 

How do I select those logs?

SAP published a native solution to Microsoft Sentinel. By using the Microsoft platform, you may configure the ingestion rule on the Data Collection Rule instance in Azure.

Once you have deployed the LogServ connector on Sentinel, you can browse the same Azure resource group to identify your generated Data Collection rule. It will read something like “-SAPLogServDCR-”. Tailor the existing Kusto Query Language (KQL) transformation to your needs (step 4). The default one takes all logs.

 

Consider the kql snippet below to filter the log by types. In my sample the data collection rule only accepts HANA db, Linux OS, and DNS.

let fromUnixTime = (t: real) {
    datetime(1970-01-01) + t * 1sec
};
source
| extend TimeGenerated = fromUnixTime(_time)
| extend Raw = _raw
| extend UnixTimestamp =_time
| where clz_dir in ("hana", "linux", "dns")
| project-away  _raw, _time

You have full control over your selections and target Log Analytics tables. For instance, you might point one set of LogServ data to cheap auxiliary table plans for auditing requirements. I like this image from Microsoft Learn to explain the different table types. By design the LogServ connector comes with a built-in table on Analytics plan. It is called SAPLogServ_CL.

 

Weigh retention time, real time needs, and storage cost. See this blog for additional details.

 

Final Words

That’s a wrap 🌯. Today you saw how a single line of KQL (Kusto Query Language) makes all the difference between drinking from the SAP RISE logs firehose that is SAP LogServ and selectively choosing SAP logs that mean something to your use case.

Get started with your deployment from here. Stay tune for more detections and security content.

What use cases and detections are you implementing with LogServ and Microsoft Sentinel? Let me know in the comments or reach out directly.

Cheers Martin

entry.title: I'm not able to access Process Manager from SAP Signavio Process Collaboration Hub in my trial acct.
entry.content:
For the SAP Certified Associate - Process Management Consultant - SAP Signavio
certification (C_SIGPM_2403), I am taking the Learning Journey called "Managing Business Processes with SAP Signavio Solutions". There is a link in the learning journey to subscribe to a 30 day trial for SAP Signavio Process Collaboration Hub at https://editor.signavio.com/p/register . I have registered and I do have access to the trial version of SAP Signavio Process Collaboration Hub, but I do not see any way to access the Signavio Process Manager as described in the learning journey.

How can I get access to the Signavio Process Manager from my Signavio Process Collaboration Hub trial account?

entry.title: Re: Rule Context for Onboarding 2.0 is not set to No
entry.content:
Here are a few approaches you can consider:
1- Use a Conditional Check Inside the Rule

Since you can't use the rule context directly for OnInit, you can add a condition inside the rule to check whether the process is part of Onboarding. For example:

  • Use a field like eventReason, userType, or a custom flag that distinguishes Onboarding users.
  • Add a condition like:

  IF userType != 'ONB' THEN

     Set email visibility to None

This way, the rule logic itself excludes Onboarding scenarios

2- Use a Custom Field or Flag

If no existing field can distinguish Onboarding users, consider:

  • Creating a custom field (e.g., isOnboardingUser) that is set during the Onboarding process.

Use this field in your rule condition to bypass the logic for Onboarding users.

3- Split the Rule Logic

If the rule is complex, consider splitting it into two rules:

  • One rule scoped only for EC (with the GDPR logic).
  • Another rule (or none) for Onboarding, depending on your needs.

entry.title: SAP Collection Management Extention to the Program
entry.content:
Hello All,

We are trying to asses the feasiblity of appending few Project system fields in customer invoice and also correspondingly flow them to Collection Worklist.Given the scenario I have below queries:-

1) Is there any extenion to via BADI/BAPI etc available to the Program FDM_COLL_SEND_ITEMS in SAP Public cloud so that we can enhance the program to carry these fields.

2) Once the data is transfered to Collection then the same fields also needs to be enhanced in program UDM_GENWL so that it flows to the worklist.

Please let me know if you have worked on any extensions for the above programs in SAP Public Cloud for any fields.

Regards,

Nikhil

entry.title: Build Process Automation (BPA/IRPA) scroll web screens and getting elements
entry.content:
Hello, I am facing issue getting list of values in case that some are not visible and screen need to be scrolled vertically.

I am using activities to get count (nr of used lines) and their values - these activities are not configurable and only get array of visible values. If list is longer, I need to scroll. Only working solution I found is to declare scroll element, then use Mouse click on it and then Scroll Wheel

But how to get all values and do not duplicate them? If I scroll and count elements (or get values) I always get what is visible on screen, without any relation what was previously already captured. Is there any standard approach or best practice for this? 

Many thanks.

entry.title: How to consume a RAP Behavior Event for R_JOURNAL- SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition ( ABAP CLOUD )
entry.content:
Hello Experts

How can I consume a standard event of the Behavior Definition finance object “R_JOURNALENTRYTP” locally in the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - In-App Developer Extensibility system ?

Or how you could detect the create or modify events of a financial accounting entry. To run an abap cloud development in parallel or by background job ?. Such a process contains commits and updates other objects.

Currently, in the Custom Logic App I have not been able to find a BADI that meets my requirement and allows me to run an abap development in parallel at the time of a creation or modification of an accounting entry.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance 

ABAP Cloud SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment ABAP Development 

Please support

Best regards,

Antony Pantoja

entry.title: ISSUE IBP MANAGE ANALYTICS STORIES - COPY PASTE
entry.content:
Hello, 

Until last week, all users in my company could still update table by copy/paste in IBP table.

Since the last update from May-25 05, it does not work anymore. When you copy/paste form Excel it shows the following message "Please allow the application to access the clipboard in order to paste content from external applications.".

Despite multiple attents and tests to allow the app, it still does not work.

Has anyone faced and solved this issue ? If yes how did you do? 

I am using Microsoft Edge under Windows 11.

Thank you 

Elodie

entry.title: Playlist mentioned in Byte size video not available

Dear Team, I was following the SAP CPQ related byte size videos. during the process I came across this Taking a Grand Tour of CPQ Videos - SAP CPQ

In this there are a play list of 48 videos/tutorials mentioned. Could you pls guide me to where i can find these videos/tutorials. These, I think, will give all the community members an excellent view of the CPQ and they can be your ambassadors for the use of the software. 

Kr Chakradhar

entry.title: Provision User via IPS to SAP Concur via Identity v4 API
entry.content:
Dear Community,

I hope my question finds you well!

Does anyone have experience with provisioning users from SAP Cloud Identity Services – Identity Directory via SAP IPS using the latest API version, Identity v4 API (also known as IPS property concur.api.version = 2)?

We were able to provision users with their core identity information (part of the main identity), but are not able to maintain attributes that are part of Spend or Travel. Based on what we found in this documentation:
https://developer.concur.com/api-reference/user-provisioning/v4.user-provisioning.html

…it seems that you need to call the UPS (User Provisioning Service) in order to maintain all attributes. This URL should follow the pattern:

https://{datacenterURI}/profile/v4/Users/

What SAP IPS does instead is call the following URL:

https://{datacenterURI}/profile/identity/v4/Users/

Does anyone know if there is a way to determine which URL is used by SAP IPS? It seems that the property concur.api.version defines which API URL is being used.

 

EDIT:

As described here, it seems that SAP IPS is restricted from maintaining the Spend Profile.

However, we think that it might be possible to achieve this using the IPS target system type "SCIM-System" to reach the following API URL:

https://{datacenterURI}/profile/v4/Users/

Any feedback from someone who has tried this before or has any further information about integrating SAP IPS would be much appreciated 🙂

Thank you in advance for your feedback and kind regards,
Alex

entry.title: Error DMC_RT_MSG 41 _IT_IO_S
entry.content:
Hello together,

I encounter the following error but do not why it arises. I am doing the migration for fixed assets and this message comes up. Please help me out on this:

entry.title: Re: Missing Business Partner View, Fields, Purchasing Data
entry.content: Hello, you find the solution for this? we have the same problem

entry.title: Re: Missing mode selector and infinite loading when accessing a Composable Storefront in SmartEdit
entry.content:
This situation is caused by a misconfiguration in allowOrigins in smart-edit-feature.module.ts file. Set the SmartEdit Web Site domain in allowOrigin in the smart-edit-feature.module.ts file, as per the below example:

provideConfig(<SmartEditConfig>{
   smartEdit: {
     storefrontPreviewRoute: 'your-preview-route-value',
     allowOrigin: '<SmartEdit Web Site domain>',
   },
 })

entry.title: Replication Question S4 Hana to Concur for Cost Centers which should not be replicated
entry.content: We have S4 connected with Concur and already successfully in use. However we have now a large list of Cost Centers inside of several Company Codes which should not be replicated to Concur because they are not having a Profit Center assigned in inside of the Cost Center and should not be used in Concur. Do we have any way in the replication that I can exclude those from the replication? and it is based on Company Code level and not only on Controlling Are level.

entry.title: Re: Upload account statement MT940 incorrect
entry.content:
Hi Stanco,

You need to put statement number in 28C and  if same statement has multiple parts, you need to put same statement number plus sequence number. If its a different statement, put only statement number. Also don't put random numbers, you have to use statement number given in bank statement MT940 and make sure its not already used in the system for particular bank account.

You can cross check what statement numbers are already uploaded for particular bank accounts in FF67.

Please check and if you still get error, please put full error message.

 

Regards

Vijaykumar

entry.title: Re: I designed a report but all the headings are not expo...
entry.content: I fixed it by making sure there are no spaces between columns.

entry.title: SAP GUI 8 patch 12 gives an error "the path for the theme: Enjoy;", after installation.
entry.content:
The SAP GUI for windows 8 patch 12 (GUI800_12-80006341.EXE)
gives an error "the path for the theme: Enjoy;" when opening, after installation.
We did not receive any error messages during installation.
After installation we try to open the SAP GUI in question. This does not work.
We get this error:

The graphical layout of the SAP GUI is also no longer readable.
When we try to open an SAP environment via the SAP GUI logon we get the following error messages.
After clicking OK on the windows of these error messages nothing happens anymore:

entry.title: Re: REDUCE a decilmal value
entry.content: The answer by Douglas is currently marked as being the right solution, but it's buggy (an overflow short dump or decimal truncation may happen) so it's misleading people in 2025. As you noticed that it was incorrect, could you ask the moderator to unflag the solution? I don't know if the moderator can do that but it's worth trying. Thank you. Sandra

entry.title: Re: REDUCE a decilmal value
entry.content: '0.000' or '0.0000' are incorrect, they both may raise an overflow short dump. Use a numeric type with enough digits, as explained in other replies and by the original poster himself.

Or on a complete separate system/tenant?

Thanks for the clarification.

Sebastian

entry.title: Need to disable multiple users

entry.title: Re: /SCWM/PACK - Screen BADI Implementation

entry.title: Re: Comprehensive documentation of changes for those of u...
entry.content:
Are you being cruel about the total absence of any new interesting features for over 15 years?

Only noticable change since 2008 is the option to control the vertical formatting of text.

It's been 64 bit since 2020 but the only advantage there is that you can now have just 64 bit DSNs for all your applications.

The only reason to upgrade since 2008 is for support for later versions of Crystal Server/SAP BI and to have SAP's 'support'.

entry.title: Re: CROSS PLANT STORAGE LOCATION GRN ISSUE FOR PRODUCTION...
